analysis.note: M&M keeps type/name strings readable in the file body but the v38/v39 header is obfuscated. Simple 8-byte XOR (including magic-derived keys) does not yield valid section offsets. Runtime memory mirrors the same encrypted header.

error: Could not recover XOR key (full_encryption=True, tried [8, 16, 4, 32, 12, 24])
warning: Header section offsets remain invalid; Il2CppDumper will not parse this.
